title: Circle hit with class action lawsuit over alleged inaction in $280 million Drift exploit

title: Hacked DeFi platform Drift gets funds to repay customers and relaunch with Tether
snippet: Drift, the DeFi platform that lost around $270 million in clients assets to a North Korean hack earlier this month, has secured $147.5 million in funding from Tether and partners to recover user funds and relaunch with the Tether stablecoin at its centre.
